description_long: This is a disposable paper coffee cup with a white plastic lid and a brown cardboard sleeve. The cup features the Starbucks Coffee logo prominently on one side, with additional printed text and checkboxes for drink customization visible on the opposite side. The lid is domed with a small drinking slot, designed to prevent spills and retain heat. The cardboard sleeve is ribbed and wraps around the middle of the cup, providing insulation for holding hot beverages. The cup is primarily white, with the sleeve in a natural brown color and the logo in green and white. The overall design is typical of takeaway coffee cups found in urban environments.
description: A white disposable coffee cup with a plastic lid, brown cardboard sleeve, and Starbucks branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Starbucks Coffee logo and the brown cardboard sleeve.
description_view_1: Back view displaying printed text, checkboxes, and the sleeve with no visible logo.
description_view_2: Side view with more printed text and the sleeve, logo not visible.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the Starbucks logo and sleeve, similar to the front but slightly rotated.
